creator: brian@utell.co.uk
text:
Nick,

Can we re-try this ?  LQR now works with my ISP, and works
over a ppp <=> ppp direct link.  The only problem that has
been found (& fixed) is that once the line was lost due
to LQR failure, it would never survive again in -auto mode.
The "current number of failures" variable wasn't being
re-initialised.

Thanks.
-- 
Brian <brian@awfulhak.org> <brian@freebsd.org>
      <http://www.awfulhak.org>
Don't _EVER_ lose your sense of humour !
